title: RH-EML Deep III: Stratified Zero Analysis & Converse Proof Attempt

trivial_zeros_negatives.functional_eq_image: maps to σ=1/2+it zeros under EML-3

zero_density.key: N(σ,T) = EML-2 throughout; EML-∞ behavior only at stratum boundaries

eml2_smoothness_hypothesis.hypothesis: N(σ,T) is EML-2 smooth for σ ∈ (1/2, 1)
eml2_smoothness_hypothesis.converse_argument: RH false ⟹ ∃ρ with Re(ρ) = σ₀ > 1/2 ⟹ N(σ,T) has jump discontinuity at σ=σ₀ ⟹ N violates EML-2 smoothness ⟹ ESH false. Contrapositive: ESH ⟹ RH.
eml2_smoothness_hypothesis.gap: ESH itself is unproven — equivalent strength to RH

density_hypothesis.hierarchy: RH ⟹ DH (stronger) ⟹ LH (weaker): all capture EML-2 shadows of RH

conditional_proof_fragment.assumption_A: N(σ,T) is C¹ in σ for σ ∈ (1/2,1) — EML-2 regularity
conditional_proof_fragment.assumption_B: ζ(s) has no pole for 1/2 < Re(s) < 1 — known (EML-0)
conditional_proof_fragment.insight: The proof is EML-0 given A; getting A is the EML-∞ difficulty

converse_proof.key_insight: Converse: ESH (EML-2 smoothness) ⟺ RH; proof is EML-0 given ESH

4.grh_conjecture: All zeros on σ=1/2 (same EML-3 stratum as ζ)

7.grh_conjecture: All zeros on σ=1/2 (same EML-3 stratum as ζ)

11.grh_conjecture: All zeros on σ=1/2 (same EML-3 stratum as ζ)

23.grh_conjecture: All zeros on σ=1/2 (same EML-3 stratum as ζ)

10.insight: RH: oscillations at amplitude x^{1/2}=EML-1; off-RH: x^{σ₀} with σ₀>1/2

100.insight: RH: oscillations at amplitude x^{1/2}=EML-1; off-RH: x^{σ₀} with σ₀>1/2

1000.insight: RH: oscillations at amplitude x^{1/2}=EML-1; off-RH: x^{σ₀} with σ₀>1/2

l_functions.key_insight: All L-functions inherit same EML stratification: zeros=EML-3, GRH=EML-∞

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Ramanujan bound |a_p|≤2, Langlands functoriality, proof structure given ESH
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Euler product, Wigner surmise, zeros in σ>1 half-plane
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: N(σ,T) density, level variance log(L), ESH smoothness condition
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: GUE pair correlation sinc², gamma factors, oscillatory explicit formula sum
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: GRH/RH, stratum 1 emptiness, Langlands correspondence, ESH itself

key_theorem: The EML RH Stratification Theorem (Deep III): Each EML-∞ stratum corresponds to distinct zero behavior. Stratum 0 (σ=1/2, corrected EML-3): GUE statistics — pair correlation = EML-3 (sinc²), Wigner = EML-1, level variance = EML-2. Stratum 1 (1/2<σ<1, EML-∞): conjectured empty (RH). Converse direction: EML-2 Smoothness Hypothesis (ESH) for N(σ,T) ⟺ RH. The proof given ESH is EML-0 (pure logic); proving ESH is EML-∞. All L-functions (Dirichlet, automorphic GL(n)) inherit the same stratification. The Langlands program = EML-∞ (connects L-function EML-∞ structures). The EML-2 Skeleton Theorem applies: N(σ,T) = EML-2 shadow of EML-∞ RH.
rabbit_hole_log: GUE = EML-3: sinc² pair correlation — same depth as Fourier, QFT matrix, theta-vacuum
Wigner surmise = EML-1: s*exp(-πs²/4) — same as ISI, ADSR decay, BCS!
ESH ⟺ RH: both are EML-∞; ESH is the EML-2 skeleton elevated to EML-∞
Explicit formula = EML-3: Σ x^ρ/ρ is oscillatory sum — same as Fourier series
Langlands = EML-∞: the greatest connection in number theory is the deepest EML stratum
Level variance = EML-2: log(L) — same depth as Shannon entropy, running coupling

connections.S171_rh_deep: S171 corrected σ=1/2 to EML-3; S181 builds full GUE statistics
connections.S180_grand_synth: ESH = EML-2 skeleton of RH (Horizon Theorem III instance)
connections.S176_stochastic: Wigner = EML-1: same depth class as FK discount, ADSR decay
